name: security-compliance
description: Security and compliance operations. Bundles Vanta (SOC 2/ISO/HIPAA GRC), KnowBe4 (security awareness), ThreatLocker (zero-trust endpoint), and Blumira (SIEM and detection), alongside core audit-readiness, evidence-gap, risk-heatmap, and approval-triage skills.

vanta_client_id.title: Vanta client ID
vanta_client_id.description: Vanta OAuth2 client ID. Leave blank to disable Vanta.

vanta_base_url.title: Vanta base URL
vanta_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default (https://api.vanta.com/v1).

knowbe4_api_key.title: KnowBe4 API key
knowbe4_api_key.description: KnowBe4 reporting API key. Leave blank to disable KnowBe4.

knowbe4_region.title: KnowBe4 region
knowbe4_region.description: KnowBe4 shard: us (default), eu, ca, uk, de. Leave blank for us.

knowbe4_base_url.title: KnowBe4 base URL
knowbe4_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the region default.

threatlocker_api_key.title: ThreatLocker API key
threatlocker_api_key.description: ThreatLocker API user key. Leave blank to disable ThreatLocker.

threatlocker_organization_id.title: ThreatLocker organization ID
threatlocker_organization_id.description: Optional. Only set when acting on a managed child organization.

threatlocker_base_url.title: ThreatLocker base URL
threatlocker_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default shard.

blumira_client_id.title: Blumira client ID
blumira_client_id.description: Blumira OAuth2 client ID. Use this plus the secret, or supply a JWT token instead.

blumira_jwt_token.title: Blumira JWT token
blumira_jwt_token.description: Pre-issued Blumira JWT bearer token (alternative to client ID/secret).

blumira_base_url.title: Blumira base URL
blumira_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default (https://api.blumira.com/public-api/v1).
